external_services.service_name: Application for Certification of Property Holdings/ No Property Holdings/ No Improvement
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Certification of Property Holdings_ No Property Holdings_ No Improvement
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C - Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: All property owners and all authorized representatives

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Transfer Certificate of Title (1 photocopy) OR Old tax declaration (1 photocopy)
Valid Government ID of owner (1 photocopy) OR Corporate Secretary ID for corporations
For Representatives: SPA or Authorization Letter (1 original) + Valid ID (1 photocopy)

steps.client_step: 1. Proceed to assigned window, submit requisition slip and requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive slip and verify records; 1.2. Issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Assessment Clerk II

steps.client_step: 2. Present Order of Payment and pay at the Lipa City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II

steps.client_step: 3. Present Official Receipt to the Assessor's Office
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Verify data, prepare and print Certificate; 3.2. Review and sign certificate
steps.person_responsible: Assessment Clerk II, Local Assessment Operations Officer II/III/IV

steps.client_step: 4. Claim certification and sign logbook
steps.agency_action: 4. Release Certificate
steps.person_responsible: Assessment Clerk II

external_services.service_name: Application for Transfer of Land Ownership (Consolidation and Subdivision)
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Transfer of Land Ownership (Consolidation and Subdivision)
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C –Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: All property owners and all authorized representatives

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Certified True Copy of TCT (1 original) or photocopy (present original)
Deed of Sale/Extra-Judicial Settlement/Donation; Latest Realty Tax Receipt; CAR; Transfer Tax Receipt; Approved subdivision plan; Deed of Partition
checklist_of_requirements.source: Register of Deeds / BIR / Treasurer's Office

steps.client_step: 1. Fill-up requisition form and attach requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1 - 1.8: Validate docs, record, tax mapping, reflect subdivision, prepare and approve FAAS; 1.9 - 1.15: Encoding, printing PRF, assign ARP No., sign Tax Declaration, record and inform client
steps.person_responsible: Tax Mapper II/III/IV, Local Assessment Operations Officer II/III/IV, City Assessor

steps.client_step: 2. Present Order of Payment and pay at the Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II

steps.client_step: 3. Present Official Receipt and claim Tax Declaration
steps.agency_action: 3. Release Tax Declaration
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Assessment Clerk II

external_services.service_name: Application for Transfer of Land Ownership (Simple)
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C - Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: All property owners and all authorized representatives

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Certified True Copy of TCT; Deed of Sale/Donation/Settlement; Latest Realty Tax Receipt; CAR; Transfer Tax Receipt
checklist_of_requirements.source: Register of Deeds / BIR / Treasurer's Office

steps.client_step: 1. Fill-up requisition form and attach requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1 - 1.10: Validate, verify PRF, evaluate docs, encode, update PRF manually, check/sign/approve Tax Declaration, record and issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Assessment Clerk II, Local Assessment Operations Officer I-IV, City Assessor

steps.client_step: 2. Present Order of Payment and pay at Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II

steps.client_step: 3. Present Official Receipt and claim Tax Declaration
steps.agency_action: 3. Release Tax Declaration
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Assessment Clerk II

external_services.service_name: Request for Appraisal and Assessment of Real Property for Cancelled Buildings/ Dismantled Machineries
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Appraisal and Assessment of Real Property for Cancelled Buildings_ Dismantled Machineries
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C - Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: All property owners and all authorized representatives

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Tax declaration of building/machinery (1 original, 1 photocopy)
Latest realty tax receipt (1 photocopy)

steps.client_step: 1. Fill-up requisition form and attach requirements
steps.agency_action: 1. Receive documents, assign control number, forward for ocular inspection approval
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide II, Assessment Clerk II, City Assessor

steps.client_step: 2. Be present during ocular inspection
steps.agency_action: 2.1 - 2.4: Conduct ocular inspection, prepare report, approve Notice of Cancellation, and forward to Treasurer's Office
steps.person_responsible: Local Assessment Operations Officer IV, City Assessor

external_services.service_name: Request for Appraisal and Assessment of Real Property for New Building and Improvement and Newly Acquired Machineries
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Appraisal and Assessment of Real Property for New Building and Improvement and Newly Acquired Machineries
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C - Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: All property owners and all authorized representatives

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Approved building plan; Certificate of Occupancy; Tax declaration of land; Latest tax receipt; Photo of building; Bill of Materials
For Machineries: Sworn statement (acquisition cost, date, description)

steps.client_step: 1. Proceed to Window 3, fill up requisition form and attach documents
steps.agency_action: 1.1 - 1.7: Review docs, approve inspection, verify, conduct ocular inspection (4 days), prepare FAAS/PRF, encode, sign/approve tax declaration, and inform client
steps.person_responsible: City Assessor, Assessment Clerk II, Local Assessment Operations Officer II-IV

steps.client_step: 2. Present Order of Payment and pay at Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Local Revenue Collection Clerk II

steps.client_step: 3. Present Official Receipt to Assessor's Office
steps.agency_action: 3.1 - 3.2: Forward tax declaration to Records, record and assign new number
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Assessment Clerk II

steps.client_step: 4. Claim new tax declaration at Releasing Window
steps.agency_action: 4. Release owner's copy
steps.person_responsible: Assessment Clerk II

external_services.service_name: Request for Certified True Copies of Tax Declaration
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Certified True Copies of Tax Declaration
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C - Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: All property owners and all authorized representatives

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: TCT or Real Property Tax Receipt; Owner's ID; (If representative: SPA/Authorization + ID)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requisition slip and requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive and verify; 1.2. Issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Assessment Clerk II

steps.client_step: 2. Present Order of Payment and pay at Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II

steps.client_step: 3. Present Official Receipt to Assessor's Office
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Prepare/Verify/Print Tax Declaration; 3.2. Review and sign
steps.person_responsible: Assessment Clerk II, Local Assessment Operations Officer IV

steps.client_step: 4. Receive Certified True Copy
steps.agency_action: 4. Release tax declaration
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Assessment Clerk II

external_services.service_name: Request for Certified True Copy of Tax Declaration (Manual)
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Certified True Copy of Tax Declaration (Manual)
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C - Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: All property owners and all authorized representatives

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: TCT or Real Property Tax Receipt; Owner's ID; (If representative: SPA/Authorization + ID)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requisition slip and requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive and check; 1.2. Issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Assessment Clerk II

steps.client_step: 2. Present Order of Payment and pay at Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II

steps.client_step: 3. Present Official Receipt to Assessor's Office
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Verify from archive and type manually (4 days); 3.2. Review and sign
steps.person_responsible: Assessment Clerk II, Local Assessment Operations Officer III/IV

steps.client_step: 4. Receive Certified True Copy
steps.agency_action: 4. Release manual tax declaration
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Assessment Clerk II

external_services.service_name: Request for Order of Payment for Cadastral Cost
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Order of Payment for Cadastral Cost
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C –Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: All property owners and all authorized representatives

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Transfer Certificate of Title (1 photocopy); Tax Declaration (1 photocopy)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requisition slip at Tax Mapping Division
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive slip; 1.2. Verify claimants; 1.3. Compute cost; 1.4. Issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Draftsman II, Tax Mapper II

external_services.service_name: Request for Photocopy/ Digital Pictures of Tax Map
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Photocopy_ Digital Pictures of Tax Map
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C –Government to Citizen, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: All property owners and all authorized representatives

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Transfer Certificate of Title (1 photocopy); Tax Declaration (1 photocopy)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requisition slip at Tax Mapping Division
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive slip; 1.2. Issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Draftsman II, Tax Mapper II

steps.client_step: 2. Present Order of Payment and pay at Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and official receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II

steps.client_step: 3. Present official receipt to Assessor's Office
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Verify tax map (location and boundaries)
steps.person_responsible: Assessment Clerk II, Draftsman II, Tax Mapper II

steps.client_step: 4. Claim photocopied tax map/digital photo
steps.agency_action: 4. Release tax map/photo
steps.person_responsible: Assessment Clerk II, Draftsman II, Tax Mapper II

external_services.service_name: Request for Reclassification of Lot for Taxation Purposes
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Reclassification of Lot for Taxation Purposes
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C - Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: All property owners and all authorized representatives

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Approved Special Ordinance - 1 photocopy
Latest tax receipt – 1 photocopy
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Treasurer's Office or Property owner

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Reclassification fee – 1 photocopy

steps.client_step: 1. Proceed to the Administrative Section and submit the complete requirements to the person-in-charge
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive and record; 1.2. Assess and evaluate; 1.3. Detach the PRF; 1.4. Forward to Tax Mapping; 1.5. Encode data on FAAS; 1.6. Approve FAAS; 1.7. Forward to Appraisal; 1.8. Encode/prepare FAAS and PRF manually; 1.9. Check, sign and approve; 1.10. Forward to Records; 1.11. Record in Records of Assessment; 1.12. Issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: City Assessor, Asst. City Assessor, Tax Mapper II/III/IV, Assessment Clerk II, Administrative Aide IV

steps.client_step: 2. Present the Order of Payment and pay the corresponding fee at the Lipa City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa City Assessor's Office and claim the Tax Declaration
steps.agency_action: 3. Release the tax declaration
steps.person_responsible: Assessment Clerk II

external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C –Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: All property owners and all authorized representatives

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Transfer Certificate of Title – 1 photocopy
Tax Declaration – 1 photocopy
checklist_of_requirements.source: Property owner or City Assessor's Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Latest Realty Tax Receipt – 1 photocopy
checklist_of_requirements.source: Property owner or Lipa City Treasurer's Office

steps.client_step: 1. Proceed to the Tax Mapping Division, submit the accomplished requisition slip with the complete requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive slip; 1.2. Issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Draftsman II, Tax Mapper II

steps.client_step: 2. Present the Order of Payment and pay the corresponding fee at the Lipa City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and official receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II

steps.client_step: 3. Present the official receipt to the Lipa City Assessor's Office
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Prepare tax map certification; 3.2. Review and sign
steps.person_responsible: Assessment Clerk II, Draftsman II, Tax Mapper II/III/IV

steps.client_step: 4. Claim the tax map certification
steps.agency_action: 4. Release the tax map certification
steps.person_responsible: Assessment Clerk II, Draftsman II, Tax Mapper II
